title: Hypargyrium subrectum
taxonomy: Hypargyrium subrectum is classified as a species of moss in the family Hypnaceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as leaf shape and size. As a member of the Hypnaceae family, Hypargyrium subrectum is closely related to other mosses in this family. Further classification within the kingdom Plantae places it in the division Bryophyta, which includes all mosses and liverworts. This division is characterized by the absence of vascular tissue in its plants.
